name: Leandro Lopes
description:
'''Leandro Lopes Luiz''' (born January 24, 1984), best known as '''Leandro Lopes''', is a [[Brazil]]ian pop rock and [[axé music]] singer and songwriter.

He rose to fame after winning the [[Ídolos Brazil (season 1)|first season]] of the [[Reality television|reality television show]] ''Ídolos Brazil''. He also received the nickname "Pica-Pau" ([[Woody Woodpecker]], [[1940s]] cartoon series) because of his red-dyed hair at one point in his career.
